title: EUR/USD H2 2026 Outlook
content: Draft analysis of EUR/USD trajectory for the second half of 2026. Key themes include ECB policy path, US election influence, and transatlantic growth differential. Initial thesis favors further EUR weakness toward 1.0400.
author: Emily Carter

title: JPY Intervention Risk Assessment
content: Analysis of MOF/BOJ intervention thresholds and historical patterns. Examining verbal intervention signals and actual intervention likelihood as USD/JPY approaches 155 level.
author: Kenji Tanaka
reviewerNotes: Add quantitative analysis of past intervention P&L for context

title: EM FX Resilience in Risk-Off Scenarios
content: Study of EM currency performance during recent risk-off episodes. Compares 2024-2026 drawdowns with historical patterns to assess whether EM FX has become more resilient.
author: Hugo Santos
reviewerNotes: Consider adding a carry-adjusted returns table

title: Options Skew as a Leading Indicator
content: Research into predictive power of risk reversal skew for spot FX moves. Backtest across G10 pairs over 2020-2026 period. Preliminary results show 60% directional accuracy at 1-month horizon.
author: Sarah Mitchell
reviewerNotes: Latest backtest figures look good. Add confidence intervals

title: CAD and the Energy Transition
content: Long-term thematic piece on how Canada energy transition away from fossil fuels may reshape the CAD correlation framework. Includes scenario analysis for 2030 CAD fair value.
author: Emily Carter

title: AUD/NZD Relative Value Deep Dive
content: Expanded version of the trade idea published April 2. Includes detailed fundamental comparison, terms-of-trade analysis, and central bank policy divergence framework.
author: Liam O'Brien
reviewerNotes: Strengthen the ToT section with latest commodity data

title: CBDC Cross-Border Settlement Framework
content: Technical analysis of how CBDC interoperability protocols may affect FX settlement and pricing. Reviews mBridge, Project Dunbar, and Atlantic Council CBDC tracker data.
author: Liam O'Brien

title: Scandinavian FX Mid-Year Review
content: Comprehensive review of NOK, SEK, and DKK performance against EUR and USD. Covers central bank policy, oil dynamics, and relative valuation. Draft for June publication.
author: Erik Svensson
